title: SHALL 2-Piece Rubber Mallet Hammer Set, 16oz Rubber Hammer Mallet & 40mm Double-Faced Soft Mallet, Shockproof Fiberglass Handle with Cushion Grip, Damage-Free to Flooring, Tile, Crafts and Wood Work
features: 【16oz Rubber Mallet Hammer】- The solid hammer head is made of premium oil-resistant rubber which features good resilience and wear resistance. The large flat head is designed to deliver a soft positive strike and prevent noise and damage/scratches to percussion surface.

【Double-faced Mallet】 - The double-faced rubber mallet consists of two 1-1/2’’ (40mm) diameter heads made of different materials for versatile uses. The soft black rubber head is for lighter materials and the harder yellow PVC head is for firmer materials. The middle of the head is made of cast iron to increase the striking force.

【Shockproof Fiberglass Handle】- The hammer handle is made of shockproof fiberglass core and soft TPR and PP outer shell. The high-strength fiberglass core helps absorb vibration and reduce shock transfer/ bounce, providing efficient striking, while the ergonomically contoured shape and non-slip textured outer shell provide comfortable and strong grip to reduce the fatigue caused by long-term work.
【Firmly Connected Head】- The new embedded process is adopted to firmly connect the mallet head and the handle to prevent from loosening or detaching, ensuring safety and extending the service life.

【Multi-Purpose】- The rubber hammer set (martillo de goma) is the perfect tool for furniture assembly, home decoration, tile/ flooring installation, woodworking, handicrafts making and other blow tasks.
description: Product Description Fiberglass Handle The fiberglass core features absorbing vibration and reducing bounce, providing stable striking. The soft textured TPR and PP outer shell provides comfortable and strong grip. Premium Rubber Head Large solid head is made of premium rubber which has good resilience and wear resistance. Provide a soft but powerful strike and prevent noise and damage to percussion surface. Double-faced Head Consists of two 1-1/2’’ (40mm) diameter head for versatile uses. The soft black rubber head is for lighter materials and the harder yellow PVC head is for firmer materials. Firmly Embedded Head New embedded process connect the mallet head and handle firmly. Prevent from loosening or detaching after long-term use.
